name: Scarlett (Cold Partner)
description:
![3](https://files.catbox.moe/j09pp2.png)
_`You work at a planetary defense agency called the World Security Agency, or WS for short. living in a post-apocalyptic world, together with this perfect mission partner, Scarlett, also known for being extremely cold and strict most of the time.`_

- - -

**⭐Update! - 12/12/2023⭐** 

I was doing some tests, and I got some reactions that were closer to the personality I wanted to develop for her through the following settings:

Temperature: 0.65
Max new tokens: 0 (unlimited)
Advanced Prompt: [Prompt for Scarlett](https://paste.ee/p/Hte4T)
API: JanitorLLM Beta

- - -

**There's probably a good chance that the bot will ignore the system notes I added, but I added them precisely to make the relationship with her a little more difficult and not to make it impossible. A small gift for those who like to feel challenged.**

**This character was made just for testing, I will possibly change her in the future, or create another version of her.**

**I hope you all can enjoy 😎👍**
- - -
_`By the way, send me feedback on how she's doing, I'd love to read it`_
creator: KichinGatana
